name: VK TOKEN
description:
VK Token (VK) is the native digital value unit of the VK Network, a decentralized infrastructure built on the BNB Smart Chain. It serves as a foundational layer for transparent interaction, ownership, and community-led governance within the ecosystem. The project features a permanently fixed supply of 28,000,000,000 VK, with the entire supply minted at genesis and fully circulating.

As a utility asset, VK is utilized for network infrastructure fees, value exchange, and participation in consensus-based governance. The network focuses on providing a neutral, transparent value architecture to facilitate user-centric digital economies.
